name: Randy Choate
transactions: June 3, 1997:Drafted by theNew York Yankeesin the5th roundof the 1997 amateur draft. Player signed June 30, 1997.
December 16, 2003:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithNick JohnsonandJuan Riverato theMontreal ExposforJavier Vázquez.
March 27, 2004:Traded by theMontreal Exposto theArizona DiamondbacksforJohn Patterson.
May 5, 2005:Released by theArizona Diamondbacks.
May 11, 2005:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
October 31, 2006:Granted Free Agency.
January 9, 2007:Signed as a Free Agent with theMinnesota Twins.
March 24, 2007:Released by theMinnesota Twins.
April 13, 2007:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
October 4, 2007:Released by theArizona Diamondbacks.
November 14, 2007:Signed as a Free Agent with theMilwaukee Brewers.
October 1, 2008:Released by theMilwaukee Brewers.
December 23, 2008:Signed as a Free Agent with theTampa Bay Rays.
November 1, 2010:Granted Free Agency.
December 15, 2010:Signed as a Free Agent with theFlorida Marlins.
July 25, 2012:Traded by theMiami MarlinswithHanley Ramírezto theLos Angeles DodgersforNathan EovaldiandScott McGough.
October 29, 2012:Granted Free Agency.
December 7, 2012:Signed as a Free Agent with theSt. Louis Cardinals.
November 2, 2015:Granted Free Agency.
March 11, 2016:Signed as a Free Agent with theToronto Blue Jays.
March 30, 2016:Released by theToronto Blue Jays.
June 12, 2016:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Dodgers.
September 1, 2016:Released by theLos Angeles Dodgers.
